---
title: "robustcause Smoke Test"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = "#>", collapse = TRUE)
pkg_lib <- normalizePath(file.path(getwd(), ".robustcause-rmd-lib"), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
dir.create(pkg_lib, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
.libPaths(c(pkg_lib, .Library))
if ("robustcause" %in% loadedNamespaces()) unloadNamespace("robustcause")
install.packages("remotes", lib = pkg_lib, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
remotes::install_github("DanBaissa/RobustCause", subdir = "bindings/r/robustcause", lib = pkg_lib, upgrade = "never", force = TRUE, dependencies = TRUE, quiet = FALSE)

library(robustcause, lib.loc = pkg_lib)
stopifnot("method" %in% names(formals(robustcause::fit_rlm)))
set.seed(42)
```

## Matrix Interface

```{r}
n <- 250
x1 <- rnorm(n)
x2 <- rnorm(n)
x3 <- runif(n, -1, 1)
y <- 1 + 2 * x1 - 1.2 * x2 + 0.8 * x3 + rnorm(n, sd = 0.25)
y[c(10, 50, 120, 200)] <- y[c(10, 50, 120, 200)] + c(8, -9, 7, -8)

X <- cbind(x1 = x1, x2 = x2, x3 = x3)
dat <- data.frame(y = y, x1 = x1, x2 = x2, x3 = x3)
```

## Estimator Showcase

```{r}
m_huber_fit <- robustcause::fit_rlm(X, y, method = "m", psi = "huber")
m_tukey_fit <- robustcause::fit_rlm(X, y, method = "m", psi = "tukey_bisquare")
mm_fit <- robustcause::fit_rlm(
  X,
  y,
  method = "mm",
  tuning = 4.685,
  mm_s_control = list(n_starts = 100, fast_s_screen_subsets = 100, fast_s_keep = 20)
)
s_fit <- robustcause::fit_s_estimator(
  X,
  y,
  n_starts = 100,
  fast_s_screen_subsets = 100,
  fast_s_keep = 20
)
mass_m_huber_fit <- MASS::rlm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = dat, method = "M", psi = MASS::psi.huber)
mass_mm_fit <- MASS::rlm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = dat, method = "MM")
ols_fit <- lm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = dat)
```

```{r}
coef_table <- rbind(
  OLS = coef(ols_fit),
  M_Huber = setNames(as.numeric(m_huber_fit$coef), m_huber_fit$coef_names),
  M_Tukey = setNames(as.numeric(m_tukey_fit$coef), m_tukey_fit$coef_names),
  MM = setNames(as.numeric(mm_fit$coef), mm_fit$coef_names),
  S = setNames(as.numeric(s_fit$coef), s_fit$coef_names),
  MASS_M_Huber = coef(mass_m_huber_fit),
  MASS_MM = coef(mass_mm_fit)
)

round(coef_table, 4)
```

```{r}
true_coef <- c("(Intercept)" = 1, x1 = 2, x2 = -1.2, x3 = 0.8)
coef_error <- sweep(coef_table, 2, true_coef, "-")

accuracy_compare <- data.frame(
  rmse = sqrt(rowMeans(coef_error^2)),
  mae = rowMeans(abs(coef_error)),
  max_abs_error = apply(abs(coef_error), 1, max),
  row.names = rownames(coef_table)
)

round(accuracy_compare[order(accuracy_compare$rmse), , drop = FALSE], 4)
```


```{r}
summary(m_huber_fit)
round(confint(m_huber_fit, hc_type = "HC3"), 4)
```

```{r}
summary(mm_fit)
round(confint(mm_fit, hc_type = "HC3"), 4)
head(mm_fit$weights)
```

```{r}
summary(s_fit)
head(s_fit$weights)
```

## Formula Interface

```{r}
rlm_formula <- robustcause::fit_rlm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = dat, method = "mm")
rlm_formula
confint(rlm_formula, hc_type = "HC4")

s_formula <- robustcause::fit_s_estimator(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = dat, n_starts = 80, fast_s_screen_subsets = 80)
s_formula
```

## MM-DML Showcase

```{r}
d_treat <- 0.7 * x1 - 0.4 * x2 + 0.2 * rnorm(n)
y_dml <- 1.5 * d_treat + 0.8 * x1 + 0.3 * x3 + rnorm(n, sd = 0.3)
X_dml <- cbind(x1 = x1, x2 = x2, x3 = x3)
dat_dml <- data.frame(y = y_dml, d = d_treat, x1 = x1, x2 = x2, x3 = x3)

mm_dml_matrix <- robustcause::fit_mm_dml(
  x = X_dml,
  d = d_treat,
  y = y_dml,
  learner = "lasso",
  folds = 3L,
  seed = 13L
)
mm_dml_matrix
```

```{r}
mm_dml_data <- robustcause::fit_mm_dml(
  data = dat_dml,
  outcome = "y",
  treatment = "d",
  controls = c("x1", "x2", "x3"),
  learner = "elastic_net",
  folds = 3L,
  seed = 21L
)
mm_dml_data
```

## Adstock Showcase

```{r}
signal_media <- c(10, 12, 70, 11, 9, 55, 8, 7)
unit_media <- c(1, 1, 1, 1, 2, 2, 2, 2)
trend <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 0, 1, 2, 3)
x_media <- cbind("(Intercept)" = 1, trend = trend)
ad_dat <- data.frame(
  signal = signal_media,
  unit = unit_media,
  trend = trend
)

plain_adstock <- robustcause::build_adstock(
  signal = signal_media,
  unit_ids = unit_media,
  rho = 0.8,
  increment_method = "plain"
)

robust_adstock <- robustcause::build_adstock(
  signal = signal_media,
  unit_ids = unit_media,
  x_preclean = x_media,
  preclean = TRUE,
  preclean_method = "mm",
  nonnegative = TRUE,
  rho = 0.8,
  increment_method = "huber",
  clip_c = 15
)

robust_adstock_df <- robustcause::build_adstock(
  data = ad_dat,
  signal_col = "signal",
  unit_col = "unit",
  controls = "trend",
  preclean = TRUE,
  preclean_method = "s",
  rho = 0.75,
  increment_method = "adaptive_clip"
)

plain_adstock
robust_adstock
summary(robust_adstock_df)
```

```{r}
adstock_compare <- cbind(
  signal = signal_media,
  cleaned = round(robust_adstock$cleaned_signal, 3),
  plain_stock = round(plain_adstock$stock, 3),
  robust_stock = round(robust_adstock$stock, 3)
)

adstock_compare
```

## MMM Showcase

```{r}
set.seed(7)
n_units <- 40
n_periods <- 6
n_obs <- n_units * n_periods
unit_mmm <- rep(seq_len(n_units), each = n_periods)
time_mmm <- rep(seq_len(n_periods), times = n_units)
base_x1 <- rnorm(n_units)
x1_mmm <- rep(base_x1, each = n_periods) + rnorm(n_obs, sd = 0.2)
x2_mmm <- sin(time_mmm / 2) + rnorm(n_obs, sd = 0.2)

channel_1 <- exp(0.4 + 0.35 * x1_mmm + 0.15 * x2_mmm + rnorm(n_obs, sd = 0.15))
channel_2 <- exp(0.3 + 0.25 * x2_mmm + rnorm(n_obs, sd = 0.15))
channel_3 <- exp(0.2 + 0.20 * x1_mmm + 0.20 * x2_mmm + rnorm(n_obs, sd = 0.15))
channel_1[sample.int(n_obs, 4)] <- channel_1[sample.int(n_obs, 4)] * 8
channel_2[sample.int(n_obs, 4)] <- 0

stock_1 <- ave(channel_1, unit_mmm, FUN = function(z) stats::filter(z, filter = 0.8, method = "recursive", init = 0))
stock_2 <- ave(channel_2, unit_mmm, FUN = function(z) stats::filter(z, filter = 0.75, method = "recursive", init = 0))
stock_3 <- ave(channel_3, unit_mmm, FUN = function(z) stats::filter(z, filter = 0.7, method = "recursive", init = 0))

hill <- function(x, lambda) x / (1 + lambda * x)
y_mmm <- 1 +
  0.9 * hill(as.numeric(stock_1), 0.12) +
  0.6 * hill(as.numeric(stock_2), 0.10) +
  0.5 * hill(as.numeric(stock_3), 0.08) +
  0.4 * x1_mmm - 0.2 * x2_mmm + rt(n_obs, df = 4)

mmm_dat <- data.frame(
  y = y_mmm,
  unit = unit_mmm,
  x1 = x1_mmm,
  x2 = x2_mmm,
  channel_1 = channel_1,
  channel_2 = channel_2,
  channel_3 = channel_3
)

mmm_fit <- robustcause::fit_mmm(
  data = mmm_dat,
  outcome = "y",
  unit = "unit",
  channel_cols = c("channel_1", "channel_2", "channel_3"),
  preclean_cols = c("x1", "x2"),
  control_cols = c("x1", "x2"),
  fit_method = "huber",
  rho = c(0.8, 0.75, 0.7),
  increment_method = c("adaptive_clip", "huber", "tanh"),
  hill_lambda = c(0.12, 0.10, 0.08),
  preclean = c(TRUE, TRUE, TRUE),
  preclean_method = c("mm", "mm", "s"),
  clip_c = c(1.5, 12, 2.0),
  seed = 99L
)

mmm_fit
summary(mmm_fit)
```

```{r}
round(cbind(
  estimate = mmm_fit$channel_coef,
  truth = c(0.9, 0.6, 0.5)
), 3)
```

## Robust Covariance Showcase

```{r}
hc_types <- c("HC0", "HC1", "HC2", "HC3", "HC4", "HC4m", "HC5")

hc_se_table <- sapply(hc_types, function(hc) {
  sqrt(diag(robustcause::vcov_robust(ols_fit, hc_type = hc)))
})

rownames(hc_se_table) <- names(coef(ols_fit))
round(hc_se_table, 4)
```

## Robust SEs For `lm`

```{r}
lm_fit <- ols_fit
robustcause::vcov_robust(lm_fit, hc_type = "HC3")
robustcause::confint_robust(lm_fit, hc_type = "HC3")
```

## Weight Diagnostics

```{r}
robustcause::plot_weights(m_huber_fit)
robustcause::plot_weights(m_tukey_fit)
robustcause::plot_weights(mm_fit)
robustcause::plot_weights(s_fit)
```

## Quick Checks

```{r}
stopifnot(length(m_huber_fit$coef) == ncol(X) + 1)
stopifnot(length(m_tukey_fit$coef) == ncol(X) + 1)
stopifnot(length(mm_fit$coef) == ncol(X) + 1)
stopifnot(length(s_fit$coef) == ncol(X) + 1)
stopifnot(is.matrix(vcov(m_huber_fit)))
stopifnot(is.matrix(robustcause::vcov_robust(ols_fit, hc_type = "HC5")))
stopifnot(is.finite(mm_dml_matrix$tau_hat))
stopifnot(is.finite(mm_dml_data$tau_hat))
stopifnot(length(plain_adstock$stock) == length(signal_media))
stopifnot(length(robust_adstock$cleaned_signal) == length(signal_media))
stopifnot(max(robust_adstock$cleaned_signal) < max(signal_media))
stopifnot(length(mmm_fit$channel_coef) == 3L)
stopifnot(ncol(mmm_fit$stocks) == 3L)
stopifnot(all(is.finite(mmm_fit$channel_coef)))
stopifnot(all(is.finite(m_huber_fit$coef)))
stopifnot(all(is.finite(m_tukey_fit$coef)))
stopifnot(all(is.finite(mm_fit$coef)))
stopifnot(all(is.finite(s_fit$coef)))
```

## Local Run Notes

This notebook installs the package directly from GitHub into a temporary,
isolated library at knit time.

```{r eval = FALSE}
rmarkdown::render("bindings/r/robustcause/robustcause-smoke-test.Rmd")
```
